# Luong Nguyen

> AI & Cybersecurity Engineer based in Paris, France. 10+ years building secure backend systems and AI/LLM-powered tools. Creator of claude-howto (17k+ GitHub stars), agent-skill-manager, and sleek-ui.

## About

Luong Nguyen (luongnv89) is a Senior Engineer at Montimage specializing in AI agent workflows, LLM applications, and network security (deep packet inspection). Active open-source contributor and technical writer focused on Claude Code and AI tooling.

## OSS Projects

- [claude-howto](https://github.com/luongnv89/claude-howto): Visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — 17k+ stars
- [agent-skill-manager](https://luongnv.com/asm): Universal skill manager for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, etc.)
- [sleek-ui](https://luongnv.com/sleek-ui): Modern, minimal UI component library
- [cc-context-stats](https://github.com/luongnv89/cc-context-stats): Real-time Claude Code context usage monitoring
- [music-cli](https://music-cli.luongnv.com): Command-line music player for coders
- [vscode-markdown-preview](https://luongnv.com/vscode-markdown-preview): Clean markdown preview for VS Code
- [skills](https://github.com/luongnv89/skills): Reusable skill library for AI agents
